mapper.select: SELECT C.CMNT_NO, C.CMNT_BBS_NO, C.EMP_ID, C.CMNT_CN, C.CMNT_DT, C.CMNT_UP_NO, C.CMNT_DEL_YN, E.EMP_NM, NVL(AV.AVT_SAVE_NM, E.EMP_PROFILE) AS EMP_PROFILE FROM BBS_COMMENT C INNER JOIN EMPLOYEE E ON C.EMP_ID = E.EMP_ID LEFT JOIN EMP_AVT EA ON E.EMP_ID = EA.EMP_ID AND EA.OWN_AVT_WEAR_YN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN AVATAR AV ON EA.AVT_NO = AV.AVT_NO WHERE C.CMNT_BBS_NO = #{cmntBbsNo} AND C.CMNT_DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY CASE WHEN C.CMNT_UP_NO IS NULL OR C.CMNT_UP_NO = 0 THEN C.CMNT_NO ELSE C.CMNT_UP_NO END DESC, C.CMNT_DT ASC
